mapper.sql: pco_id, pco_source, sub_order_id, bind_order_id, pco_type, prod_type, warehouse_code, pco_status, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, model_no, qty, customer_no, weight, order_id
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.ops_pco_bak
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.ops_pco_bak (pco_id, pco_source, sub_order_id, bind_order_id, pco_type, prod_type, warehouse_code, pco_status, remark, delflag, cre_time, creator, modify_time, modifier, model_no, qty, customer_no, weight, order_id) values (#{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{prodType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into dbo.ops_pco_bak
pco_id,
pco_source,
sub_order_id,
bind_order_id,
pco_type,
prod_type,

remark,
delflag,
cre_time,

order_id,

mapper.update:
update dbo.ops_pco_bak
pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_source = #{record.pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_order_id = #{record.subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bind_order_id = #{record.bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_type = #{record.pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prod_type = #{record.prodType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_status = #{record.pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

update dbo.ops_pco_bak set pco_id = #{record.pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_source = #{record.pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_order_id = #{record.subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bind_order_id = #{record.bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_type = #{record.pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prod_type = #{record.prodType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, warehouse_code = #{record.warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_status = #{record.pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{record.remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{record.delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{record.creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{record.creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{record.modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{record.modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, model_no = #{record.modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{record.qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customer_no = #{record.customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{record.weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, order_id = #{record.orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_pco_bak
pco_source = #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER},
sub_order_id = #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bind_order_id = #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_type = #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
prod_type = #{prodType,jdbcType=INTEGER},
warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
pco_status = #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update dbo.ops_pco_bak set pco_source = #{pcoSource,jdbcType=INTEGER}, sub_order_id = #{subOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, bind_order_id = #{bindOrderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_type = #{pcoType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, prod_type = #{prodType,jdbcType=INTEGER}, warehouse_code = #{warehouseCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, pco_status = #{pcoStatus,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, delflag = #{delflag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, cre_time = #{creTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, creator = #{creator,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, modify_time = #{modifyTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, modifier = #{modifier,jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, model_no = #{modelNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, qty = #{qty,jdbcType=INTEGER}, customer_no = #{customerNo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, order_id = #{orderId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where pco_id = #{pcoId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
